error_text: SIGSEGV - Segmentation fault in rrc_gNB_send_NGAP_NAS_FIRST_REQ at /home/tcs/jayasvi/cu/openairinterface5g/openair2/RRC/NR/rrc_gNB_NGAP.c:173 (Thread: TASK_RRC_GNB)

fix_suggestion.reason: Null pointer dereference due to rrcSetupComplete being set to NULL before use.

code_patches.description: Remove the rrcSetupComplete=NULL assignment that was invalidating the parameter before use.
Validate parameter before calling crash function.
Add NULL check for rrcSetupComplete and its dedicatedNAS_Message before use.

fix_suggestion.root_cause_analysis: The crash occurred because rrcSetupComplete was set to NULL before being passed to the function, leading to a null pointer dereference when trying to access its members.
